Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path\('F:/Project/ProjectCaNhan/hospitalSample/index.html'\)
s=p.read_text\(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'\)
logo='http://benhviensannhitravinh.gov.vn/upload/1002176/20251013/LOGO_MOI_f233c8ec56.png'
placeholder='__SAN_NHI_LOGO__'
# Protect Sản Nhi logo only
s=s.replace\(logo, placeholder\)
# Restore all accidentally changed template/background/page links/assets to old template domain
s=s.replace\('http://benhviensannhitravinh.gov.vn', 'https://benhviendongnai.com.vn'\)
s=s.replace\('benhviensannhitravinh.gov.vn/template', 'benhviendongnai.com.vn/template'\)
s=s.replace\('benhviensannhitravinh.gov.vn/wp-content', 'benhviendongnai.com.vn/wp-content'\)
s=s.replace\('benhviensannhitravinh.gov.vn/wp-includes', 'benhviendongnai.com.vn/wp-includes'\)
s=s.replace\('benhviensannhitravinh.gov.vn/wp-json', 'benhviendongnai.com.vn/wp-json'\)
s=s.replace\('benhviensannhitravinh.gov.vn/xmlrpc.php', 'benhviendongnai.com.vn/xmlrpc.php'\)
# Restore protected logo URL
s=s.replace\(placeholder, logo\)
# Keep canonical/site text as Sản Nhi where it is metadata/contact, not assets
s=s.replace\('<link rel="canonical" href="https://benhviendongnai.com.vn/" />', '<link rel="canonical" href="http://benhviensannhitravinh.gov.vn/" />'\)
s=s.replace\('<meta property="og:url" content="https://benhviendongnai.com.vn/">', '<meta property="og:url" content="http://benhviensannhitravinh.gov.vn/">'\)
s=s.replace\('<meta name="og:url" content="https://benhviendongnai.com.vn/">', '<meta name="og:url" content="http://benhviensannhitravinh.gov.vn/">'\)
# Header logo link should go to Sản Nhi site, not template old site
s=s.replace\('<a href="https://benhviendongnai.com.vn/" class="custom-logo-link"', '<a href="http://benhviensannhitravinh.gov.vn/" class="custom-logo-link"'\)
# Footer policy link should remain old template if wanted; no contact identity impact.
p.write_text\(s, encoding='utf-8'\)
PY)
